description: Detection and cautious preservation guidance for FastReport VCL components. FastReport has FMX offerings, but reports, datasets, exporters, previews, and server components require package/license verification and report-template review.

rules.manual_review_reason: FastReport reports may be portable only if the target project owns a compatible FastReport FMX/runtime package and report templates are reviewed.
Dataset connectors must be reviewed with the target data layer and FastReport package.
User dataset callbacks and report data feeding are application-specific.
IB Objects connector behavior depends on the source data-access stack.
Preview UI must be matched to the FastReport FMX viewer or redesigned.
Exporter may have a compatible runtime class, but output settings and package references require review.
Legacy XLS export settings and package references require review.
XLSX export settings and package references require review.
HTML export settings and package references require review.
RTF export settings and package references require review.
CSV export settings and package references require review.
Mail export depends on platform mail/network behavior and package support.
FastReport server components require architecture-level review.
Client/server report connection behavior requires architecture-level review.
Report client behavior depends on FastReport server/client architecture.
HTTP report client behavior requires manual network/runtime review.
